config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: If there is no such thing then you should be ashamed! It was hard enough being trapped on an iron bed without anything else... That may have been true though ...we still remember some pretty important memories by using
